name: IDA Pro
description: Industry-standard interactive disassembler and decompiler. Tool: https://hex-rays.com/ida-pro/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #108 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map IDA Pro output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
